narrative:
Precinct Monroeville Village (precinct in Huron County) has 752 registered voters, with 61.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a clear Republican lean of 6.5 percentage points.
